mapper.select:
SELECT r.buy_date AS buyDate, r.product_name AS productName, r.product_cd AS productCd, r.brand_number AS brandNumber, r.factory_id AS factoryId, r.factory_name AS factoryName, r.deal_number AS sellNumber, r.buy_company_id AS buyCompanyId, r.buy_company_name AS buyCompanyName, r.buy_price As buyPrice, (r.buy_price * r.deal_number) AS buyAmount, IFNULL((c2.transport_amount * r.deal_number / c2.total_number),0) AS transAmount, r.buy_user_id AS buyUserId, r.buy_user_name AS buyUserName, r.sell_price AS sellPrice, (r.sell_price * r.deal_number) AS sellAmount, r.sell_company_id AS sellCompanyId, r.sell_company_name AS sellCompanyName, r.sell_user_id AS sellUserId, r.sell_user_name AS sellUserName, c1.dept_id As sellDeptId, c1.business_no As businessNo, c1.pay_full_time As payTime, c2.total_number As buyTotalNumber FROM t_ctr_contract c1 LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_rela r ON c1.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id = r.buy_contract_id WHERE c1.contract_type = 'S' AND c1.total_amount = c1.dealed_amount AND r.buy_date != '' AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY c1.id DESC
ORDER BY c1.id ASC
ORDER BY c1.id DESC

SELECT SUM(r.deal_number) AS sellNumber, SUM(IFNULL((c2.transport_amount * r.deal_number / c2.total_number),0)) AS transAmount, SUM( r.sell_price * r.deal_number - r.buy_price * r.deal_number - (r.deal_number * 25) - ( IFNULL( ( c2.transport_amount * r.deal_number / c2.total_number ), 0 ) ) ) AS buyMatchProfit, SUM(r.deal_number * 25) AS sellMatchProfit FROM t_ctr_contract c1 LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_rela r ON c1.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id = r.buy_contract_id WHERE c1.contract_type = 'S' AND c1.total_amount = c1.dealed_amount AND r.buy_date != '' AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
